falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 index closes above 5,500 in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A clear bullish breakout would contradict the HOLD signal and indicate a trend reversal, invalidating the UNKNOWN verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: The 10-year US Treasury yield rises above 4.5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant increase in bond yields would signal heightened risk-off sentiment, directly opposing the pattern's implied stability and invalidating the current HOLD.

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score increases to 50 or higher within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score exceeding 50 would indicate a confirmed blowoff move, refuting the UNKNOWN status and proving the pattern match is not a bottom but a top.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
